utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am telling you , years from now , schoolchildren will study it as one of the greatest first dates of all time .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: It was unbelievable ! We could totally be ourselves , we did not have to play any games .

emotion_cause.span: 2_We could totally be ourselves , we did not have to play any games .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: So have you called her yet ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Let her know I like her ? What are you , insane ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , guys .

emotion_cause.span: 4_Let her know I like her ? What are you , insane ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: It is the next day ! How needy do I want to seem ?

emotion_cause.span: 6_How needy do I want to seem ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am right , right ?

utterances.speaker: Joey and Ross
utterances.text: Oh , yeah . Yeah . Let her dangle .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I can not believe my parents are actually pressuring me to find one of you people .

emotion_cause.span: 9_my parents are actually pressuring me to find one of you people

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , God , come on , just do it ! Call her ! Stop being so testosteroney !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Which , by the way , is the real San Francisco treat .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I got her machine .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Her answer machine ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No , interestingly enough her leaf blower picked up .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: So , uh , why did not you say anything ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , no ... no ... no ... no . Last time I left a spontaneous message I ended up using the phrase " Yes indeedy ... o . "

emotion_cause.span: 16_Last time I left a spontaneous message I ended up using the phrase " Yes indeedy ... o .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Look look ! It is Rachel and Barry . No , do not everybody look at once !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay , okay , what going on ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , they are just talking ...

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah , well , does he look upset ? Does he look like he was just told to shove anything ?
